lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: Hello there, want a ride?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A ride, where to?

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: Across the river, across the river! It's just a short ride!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much will that cost me?

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: Haha, you understand us dwarves well, human!

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: It's just 2 gold pieces! Want to go?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to go further downstream.

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: You mean to the city of Keldagrim?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ehm, yes, I think so.

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: Sorry, I'm just a simple ferryman, I only go across.

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: But talk to my friend here, he sometimes goes to the city in his ship.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: You don't even have 2 gold coins, humans!

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: Come back later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: You don't even have 2 gold coins, humans!

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: Come back later.

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: Hello there, want a ride?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A ride, where to?

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: Across the river, across the river! It's just a short ride!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much will that cost me?

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: Haha, you understand us dwarves well, human!

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: It's just 2 gold pieces! Want to go?

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: You don't even have 2 gold coins, human!

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: Come back later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But... that means I'm stuck here.

lines.speaker: Dwarven Ferryman
lines.text: Hmm. I suppose I could make an exception for you this time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks a lot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.text: Come back later.
